headline: Roche (SWX:ROP) Stock May Still Be A Bargain On A 32% Run
summary: Roche Holding stock has delivered a 31.7% return over the past three years, and the current valuation checks suggest the market may still be pricing it on the low side rather than fully reflecting that performance. A 31.7% gain over three years indicates Roche Holding has already rewarded patient shareholders, which naturally raises the question of how much value is left on the table. Recent regulatory momentum, such as priority FDA reviews for therapies like Enspryng and new oncology...
